reason: Runner test/typecheck expectations for the new Coordinator streaming code paths.
Verify Coordinator triage no longer buffers; verify stream-json line-level parsing and updated streaming-required spec entry are reflected in code + tests.
Verify Coordinator's new emit failures do not abort the LLM run.
API test/typecheck expectations for the new SSE route + bus + recordAgentEvent changes.
Verify agent_events migration (workflow_request_id column + index) follows DB conventions.
Regression check: /coordinator/preview must remain rules-only (no LLM, no DB writes, no streaming) — verify nothing accidentally touched preview.
Verify new SSE route handles malformed events, disconnects, and history+live races correctly.
Verify AgentStreamEvent schema extension (workflowRequestId + workflowRunId nullability + mutual-exclusion validation) is reflected in spec + types + runtime guards.
Web test/typecheck expectations for the new Coordinator panel subscription + channel-switch.

Verify Coordinator chat panel subscribes/dedupes/reconnects per the stream rendering contract; channel-switch from request→run channel does not lose realtime; readable aggregation works for partial assistant text.
Verify subscription lifecycle, EventSource cleanup on panel teardown, no leaked listeners across request→run handoff.
Verify no new config keys were added without registry entry; this task is not expected to add new keys but check ensures Coordinator fallback question defaults remain consistent.
